lines.speaker: Boar31337Killer
lines.text: You can only trade with people in your group.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you keep killing boars?

lines.speaker: Boar31337Killer
lines.text: Because they drop bones which I am going to use to train my prayer. The meat is also a nice addition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wouldn't it be best to go steal cakes for food?

lines.speaker: Boar31337Killer
lines.text: And then go to Wintertodt? I do that every time I make an Iron person account. About time I try something new.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you at least killing the boars on task?

lines.speaker: Boar31337Killer
lines.text: No, maybe I should go get a slayer task now you mention it. Thanks for the reminder.
